name: LUX Chrome
description: The Chrome look aims for subtlety, with slightly reduced saturation, gentle contrast, and lifted shadows. It preserves a natural look, making it the most versatile recipe in this set. It works well in scenes where color isn’t meant to tell the story, and I often use it when trying to capture a sense of calm or stillness. That said, green tones (especially in foliage) can sometimes skew too warm, so a more neutral WB may help maintain balance if you’re shooting in mixed or natural light.
author: Mihai Serban
